active_skill_desc: For 4 turns, 2x orb move time; For 4 turns, create 1 spinner restricted to Wood, Dark, and Heal orbs; For 4 turns, reduce damage taken by 35%; Unlock all orbs; Change all orbs to Wood, Dark, and Heal orbs

name: Zenzou Hattori
active_skill_desc: For 1 turn, 3x HP; For 1 turn, 3x RCV; For 1 turn, 3x ATK for Dark Att.; For 1 turn, 3x ATK for all monsters; For 5 turns, set damage cap of all subs to 16,000,000,000

name: Tama
active_skill_desc: For 4 turns, bypass damage absorb shield effects; For 1 turn, the board becomes 7x6; For 1 turn, 3x RCV; Destroys all Fire, Water, Wood, Light, Dark, Heal, Jammer, Poison, Mortal Poison, and Bomb orbs

name: Former Director General of the Immigration Department, Taizou Hasegawa
name_jp: 元入国管理局局長・長谷川泰三
active_skill_desc: For 1 turn, 3x RCV; For 1 turn, 3x HP; For 1 turn, 3x ATK for all monsters; Unlock all orbs; Change all orbs to Wood, Dark, and Heal orbs; Enhance all orbs

name: Harusame 7th Division, Kamui
active_skill_desc: For 2 turns, bypass att. absorb shield effects; For 2 turns, 2x ATK for this monster; For 2 turns, set damage cap of self to 30,000,000,000; For 2 turns, set damage cap of self to 75,000,000,000

name: Oboro
active_skill_name: 魂（こころ）のままに闘え
active_skill_desc: For 6 turns, 2x ATK for rightside ally, leftside ally, and self; For 6 turns, set damage cap of rightside ally, leftside ally, and self to 20,000,000,000; For 6 turns, reduce damage taken by 40%

name: Protector God, Sadaharu
active_skill_desc: Reduce unable to match orbs effect by 9,999 turns; Remove all awoken skill binds; For 1 turn, reduce damage taken by 75%; Binds self for 2 turns

name: Gintoki Sakata & Shinsuke Takasugi (Reward)
name_jp: 坂田銀時＆高杉晋助【報酬】
active_skill_name: ……未来（アンタ）は奴等に託すぜ
active_skill_desc: After each skill, evolve to the next: 1) For 35 turns, set damage cap of self to 24,000,000,000; For 35 turns, set damage cap of self to 48,000,000,000;  2) For 2 turns, bypass void damage shield effects; For 2 turns, bypass att. absorb shield effects; For 2 turns, 1.6x HP; Unlock all orbs; Change all orbs to Water, Dark, and Heal orbs;

name: Tendoushuu, Utsuro
active_skill_name: お前にその『虚』を生き続ける覚悟はあるかァ!!
active_skill_desc: For 1 turn, create 1 spinner restricted to Dark, Heal, Jammer, and Mortal Poison orbs
